content.text: How can I reliably retrieve the associated clock signal for this component, even if it’s defined by an ancestor?
What happens if I reach the top of the hierarchy (the root) and no clock has been assigned anywhere?

If the recursion reaches the root without finding an associated clock, it will eventually raise an AssertionError because the initial `p = self._parent` requires a non-None parent to begin the traversal.
That makes sense, thanks for explaining how the recursion handles that edge case!
